results.title: Mag 7 Ride Again as Four Report After Fed Decision
Stock Market Today, April 29: SoFi Technologies Drops After Flat Full Year Guidance
Stock Market Today, April 29: Advanced Micro Devices Rises After Analyst Upgrade
Stock Market Today (Apr. 29, 2026): Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta to report after bell
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 29
Stock Market Today, April 29: Mixed Reactions as Big Tech Earnings Beat Expectations

summary: Dow fell 280 pts on April 29 (5th losing day), S&P flat at 7135.95, Nasdaq +0.04% at 24673.24. Markets weighed Fed hold decision, Iran conflict oil impact, and mixed Mag-7 earnings. Meta dropped 9% on AI capex hike; Eli Lilly surged 7%. April 30 futures up on solid Magnificent Seven earnings.
